text.title: Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern Output Contract
text.summary: Pins the shape of a valid Multi-Region Active-Active Pattern output. Subagent must satisfy this before returning to the caller.

forbidden.pattern: active-active without conflict_resolution per data type

allowed-transformations.transformation: Trim narrative fields to ≤500 chars preserving named entities + numeric claims.
Promote a 'no decision yet' state to status='pending' rather than fabricating a decision.

list.item: residency_map populated with a typed value
rto_rpo_table populated with a typed value
topology populated with a typed value
conflict_resolution populated with a typed value
failover_drill_cadence populated with a typed value
traffic_steering populated with a typed value
owner populated with a typed value
No forbidden pattern matches the output
